title: Dua After Eating
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
pronunciation: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee at'amanee hatha, wa razaqaneehi, min ghayri hawlin minnee wa la quwwah
translation: Praise be to Allah who has fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power on my part.

title: Dua Upon Waking Up
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
pronunciation: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushoor
translation: Praise be to Allah who gave us life after having caused us to die, and to Him is the resurrection.

title: Dua for Entering Home
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
pronunciation: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'ala Allahi Rabbina tawakkalna
translation: In the name of Allah we enter, and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we place our trust.

title: Dua for Travel
arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
pronunciation: Subhanal-lathee sakhkhara lana hatha wama kunna lahu muqrineen, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqaliboon
translation: Glory is to Him Who has subjected this to us, and we could never have accomplished this by ourselves. And indeed, to our Lord we will return.

title: Dua for Visiting the Sick
arabic: لَا بَأْسَ، طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
pronunciation: La ba'sa, tahoorun in sha Allah
translation: No harm, it is a purification, if Allah wills.

title: Dua for Times of Distress (Dua of Yunus)
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
pronunciation: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu minaz-zalimeen
translation: There is no god but You, glory be to You; indeed, I was among the wrongdoers.
